name: Collaborative 3D Editor
oneLiner: A real-time collaborative 3D scene editor built for the web.
description: A backend-heavy project focused on real-time synchronization of 3D scenes between multiple users. The system handles shared state, concurrent updates, and persistent storage of scene data.

name: HTTP Proxy Inspector
oneLiner: A custom-built HTTP proxy server in Java.
description: A low-level networking project implementing an HTTP/1.1 proxy server from scratch. Focused on understanding protocols, request parsing, and concurrent connections.
